sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْمُعَلِّمَةُ: «مَنْ سَارَ عَلَى الدَّرْبِ وَصَلَ».
sentences.translation: Učiteljica je rekla: «Ko hoda po putu, stići će».
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: «Whoever walks the path will arrive».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الِاسْتِمْرَارَ فِي الْعَمَلِ يُوصِلُنَا إِلَى هَدَفِنَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da nastavljanje s radom vodi nas do cilja.
sentences.translationEn: This means that continuing to work will lead us to our goal.

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَ يُوسُفُ عَلَى الرَّسْمِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je svaki dan vježbao crtanje.
Nakon godinu dana je postao dobar crtač.
sentences.translationEn: After a year he became a good artist.
